question: 1. Create STUDENT table
query: CREATE TABLE STUDENT (SID NUMBER, SNAME VARCHAR2(30), AGE NUMBER, COURSE VARCHAR2(20));

question: 2. Create EMPLOYEE table
query: CREATE TABLE EMPLOYEE (EID NUMBER, ENAME VARCHAR2(40), SALARY NUMBER(8,2), DEPTNO NUMBER);

question: 3. Create DEPARTMENT table
query: CREATE TABLE DEPARTMENT (DEPTNO NUMBER, DNAME VARCHAR2(30), LOCATION VARCHAR2(30));

question: 4. Create BOOK table
query: CREATE TABLE BOOK (BOOK_ID NUMBER, TITLE VARCHAR2(50), AUTHOR VARCHAR2(40), PRICE NUMBER);

question: 5. Create COURSE table
query: CREATE TABLE COURSE (CID NUMBER, CNAME VARCHAR2(40), DURATION NUMBER);

question: 6. Create PROJECT table
query: CREATE TABLE PROJECT (PID NUMBER, PNAME VARCHAR2(50), START_DATE DATE, END_DATE DATE);

question: 7. Create CUSTOMER table
query: CREATE TABLE CUSTOMER (CID NUMBER, CNAME VARCHAR2(40), CITY VARCHAR2(30), PHONE NUMBER);

question: 8. Create SALES table
query: CREATE TABLE SALES (SALE_ID NUMBER, PRODUCT_NAME VARCHAR2(50), QUANTITY NUMBER, PRICE NUMBER);

question: 9. Create Structure Only (EMP_COPY)
query: CREATE TABLE EMP_COPY AS SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE 1=0;

question: 10. Create with Data (EMP_BACKUP)
query: CREATE TABLE EMP_BACKUP AS SELECT * FROM EMP;

question: 11. Add EMAIL column to STUDENT
query: ALTER TABLE STUDENT ADD (EMAIL VARCHAR2(50));

question: 12. Add PHONE column to EMPLOYEE
query: ALTER TABLE EMPLOYEE ADD (PHONE NUMBER);

question: 13. Modify SNAME size
query: ALTER TABLE STUDENT MODIFY (SNAME VARCHAR2(50));

question: 14. Modify SALARY precision
query: ALTER TABLE EMPLOYEE MODIFY (SALARY NUMBER(10,2));

question: 15. Add multiple columns to CUSTOMER
query: ALTER TABLE CUSTOMER ADD (CITY_NEW VARCHAR2(30), PINCODE NUMBER);

question: 16. Rename a column
query: ALTER TABLE STUDENT RENAME COLUMN SNAME TO STUDENT_NAME;

question: 17. Drop a column
query: ALTER TABLE STUDENT DROP COLUMN AGE;

question: 18. Add NOT NULL constraint
query: ALTER TABLE EMPLOYEE MODIFY (SALARY NOT NULL);

question: 19. Increase TITLE size
query: ALTER TABLE BOOK MODIFY (TITLE VARCHAR2(100));

question: 20. Add MANAGER_ID column
query: ALTER TABLE EMPLOYEE ADD (MANAGER_ID NUMBER);

question: 21. Rename STUDENT to STUDENTS
query: RENAME STUDENT TO STUDENTS;

question: 22. Rename EMPLOYEE to EMP_MASTER
query: RENAME EMPLOYEE TO EMP_MASTER;

question: 23. Rename CUSTOMER to CLIENT
query: RENAME CUSTOMER TO CLIENT;

question: 24. Rename BOOK to BOOK_DETAILS
query: RENAME BOOK TO BOOK_DETAILS;

question: 25. Rename PROJECT to PROJECT_INFO
query: RENAME PROJECT TO PROJECT_INFO;

question: 26. Truncate STUDENTS table
query: TRUNCATE TABLE STUDENTS;

question: 27. Truncate EMP_MASTER
query: TRUNCATE TABLE EMP_MASTER;

question: 28. Drop SALES table
query: DROP TABLE SALES;

question: 29. Drop COURSE table
query: DROP TABLE COURSE;

question: 30. Drop PROJECT_INFO permanently
query: DROP TABLE PROJECT_INFO PURGE;

question: 31. Create TRAINING table
query: CREATE TABLE TRAINING (TID NUMBER, TNAME VARCHAR2(30), DURATION NUMBER);

question: 32. Add TRAINER_NAME to Training
query: ALTER TABLE TRAINING ADD (TRAINER_NAME VARCHAR2(40));

question: 33. Rename & Truncate Training
query:
RENAME TRAINING TO TRAINING_PROGRAM;
TRUNCATE TABLE TRAINING_PROGRAM;

question: 34. Create EMP_PROJECT & Modify
query:
CREATE TABLE EMP_PROJECT (EMP_ID NUMBER, ROLE VARCHAR2(30));
ALTER TABLE EMP_PROJECT MODIFY (ROLE VARCHAR2(50)) ADD (STATUS VARCHAR2(20));

question: 35. Create PRODUCT & Alter
query:
CREATE TABLE PRODUCT (PID NUMBER, PNAME VARCHAR2(50), PRICE NUMBER);
ALTER TABLE PRODUCT RENAME COLUMN PNAME TO PRODUCT_NAME;

question: 36. Modify PRODUCT Datatype
query: ALTER TABLE PRODUCT MODIFY (PRICE NUMBER(10,2));

question: 37. Create ORDERS & Drop Column
query:
CREATE TABLE ORDERS (ORDER_ID NUMBER, TOTAL_AMOUNT NUMBER);
ALTER TABLE ORDERS DROP COLUMN TOTAL_AMOUNT;

question: 38. Re-add Column with Change
query: ALTER TABLE ORDERS ADD (TOTAL_AMOUNT NUMBER(10,2));

question: 39. Create EMP_TEMP (Filtered)
query: CREATE TABLE EMP_TEMP AS SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE SALARY > 2000;

question: 40. Create EMP_ARCHIVE & Alter
query:
CREATE TABLE EMP_ARCHIVE AS SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE 1=2;
ALTER TABLE EMP_ARCHIVE ADD (ARCHIVE_DATE DATE);

question: 41. Cleanup LOG_TABLE
query:
CREATE TABLE LOG_TABLE (LOG_ID NUMBER, ACTION VARCHAR2(50));
DROP TABLE LOG_TABLE;
